translations.### [樂天市場購物 — Horie 鈦杯](https://a.r10.to: ### [Shopping on Rakuten Ichiba — Horie Titanium Cup](https://a.r10.to/hkPx9m){:target="_blank"} Order Guide

translations.***因為鈦杯非常輕感覺可以多找幾個人一起買分擔運費，應該可以把價格壓到 NT4: ***Because the titanium cup is very light, you can find a few more people to share the shipping cost, which should bring the price down to around NT4,200. I only bought two, so the shipping cost was a bit expensive.***
translations.***我是選擇 B 樣式刻字(文末有圖)。***\n\n: ***I chose style B for the engraving (see the image at the end).***
translations.***最終大小、重量：2,330 g, 38 x 30 x 21 cm***\n: ***Final size and weight: 2,330 g, 38 x 30 x 21 cm***
translations.***請務必先完成認證再進行購物。***\n\n: ***Please complete the verification before making any purchases.***
translations.***請注意如果要刻字要分開一筆一筆加入購物車，不要寫在刻字內容。***\n\n: ***Please note that if you want engraving, add each item to the cart separately. Do not write the engraving text in the product details.***
translations.**2個セットの場合の組み合わせ (記入例:プレミアムとライト) (※2セット以:
**Combination for 2 sets (example: Premium and Light) (※Please specify if ordering 2 or more sets):** How to combine the boxes when buying two or more sets. If it's troublesome, it's faster to add them separately to the cart.  
If buying only one, you can skip this.
translations.**2個セット用桐箱 (※2個以上ご注文・必要な場合のみチェックを入れる)：**:
**Paulownia Wooden Box for 2-piece Set (※Check only if ordering 2 or more items and needed):** Check this box to place two cups in the same box (see bottom right of the image).  
Skip if buying only one.
translations.**EMS 特快空運：3–8 天 6,550 日圓 (我選這個，實際2天就收到，: **EMS Express Air Shipping: 3–8 days 6,550 JPY (I chose this, actually received in 2 days, very fast)**
translations.**お届け先：** 寄送資訊，可以直接選擇剛樂天轉運新增的轉運地址，或自行新增轉: **Delivery Address:** For the shipping information, you can directly select the forwarding address you just added in Rakuten Shipping, or add a new forwarding address yourself (please be sure to enter the full forwarding address including the final number).
translations.**のしに記入するお名前(贈り主)※連名の場合は間に・を入力。内祝い等でふりがな: **Name to be written on the gift wrapping (sender) ※For joint names, please insert "・" between names. If you want furigana for occasions like thank-you gifts, please enter it as well. If over 20 characters, please write in the remarks section:** Please fill in the sender's name to be printed on the gift wrapping (noshi). For multiple senders, insert "・" between names; leave blank if not applicable.
translations.**カラー** ：選擇你要的樣式(請參考商品頁的圖片)\n: **Color**: Choose the style you want (please refer to the product page images)
translations.**ラッピングの有無** ：包裝紙樣式，A or B or 無樣式。\n\n: **Wrapping option**: Gift wrap style, A or B or no style.
translations.**名入れオプション** ：有沒有要刻字(網路商城限定， **免費刻字** )，: **Name Engraving Option**: Whether to have engraving (online store exclusive, **free engraving**), requires 7–10 business days:
translations.**名入れタイプ※単品名入れ商品を2個以上ご注文の場合は、お手数ですが1個づつ買: **Name Engraving Type ※If ordering 2 or more single name-engraved items, please add them to the cart one by one:** No engraving (no inscription), you can skip the fields below. If engraving is needed, please choose the style and fill in the text for each line according to the product page images:
translations.**形状/サイズ** ：選擇你要的款式 (請參考商品頁的圖片，有廣口、窄口、容量: **Shape/Size**: Choose the style you want (please refer to the product page images; there are wide mouth, narrow mouth, and different capacities).
translations.**支払い方法：** 支付方式，我直接刷卡(算是日本購物，可以看有哪個銀行有優惠: **Payment Method:** I paid directly by credit card (since it's a purchase from Japan, check which banks offer discounts).
translations.**桐箱デザインの選択** ：包裝盒樣式，WakuWaku驚喜版(左，限單入)或: **Choice of Paulownia Box Design**: Packaging box style, WakuWaku Surprise Edition (left, single item only) or Regular Edition (right)
translations.**送禮包裝賀簽樣式、內容：**\n\n: **Gift Wrapping and Greeting Card Styles, Content:**
translations.*1055℃の窯から生まれた高保冷チタン2重タンブラー 。アレルギーフリーで清潔: *High insulation double-walled titanium tumbler made in a 1055℃ kiln. Allergy-free, hygienic, rust-resistant, lightweight, durable, and long-lasting. Perfect as a gift for loved ones or a reward for yourself. [Free gift wrapping available] HORIE official shop / Kiln-made personalized pure titanium double tumbler horie titanium tumbler Mother's Day Father's Day Respect for the Aged Day gift beer glass Horie Tsubame-Sanjo birthday present farewell retirement celebration thank-you wedding celebration SDGs Christmas*
translations.*但我的身分證照片可能跟本人已經差太多，線上認證失敗自動轉人工，隔天才收到官方通: *But my ID photo looked quite different from my current appearance, so the online verification failed and was automatically switched to manual review. I received the official notification that the manual review was completed the next day.*
translations.*價格跟 [費用報價工具](https://globalexpress.raku: *The price is similar to the quote from the [Cost Estimation Tool](https://globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/estimate/){:target="_blank"}.*
translations.*剛出貨點可能會找不到，過陣子再查就會有了。*\n\n: *The shipment point might not be found immediately; check again after some time and it will appear.*
translations.*如果要買酒買菸之類的務必先上網查好別人的教學，我看大略是寄回台灣後要拿通知信去: *If you want to buy alcohol or cigarettes, be sure to check others' guides online first. From what I understand, after the items arrive in Taiwan, you need to bring the notification letter to pay the additional tax before release.*
translations.*感覺可以在轉運包裝時勾選去除原本的包裝減少體積與重量，節省運費。*\n\n: *It seems you can select to remove the original packaging during forwarding to reduce volume and weight, saving on shipping costs.*
translations.*有了這個地址跟電話號碼就能在日本各大電商網站進行購物跟寄送囉！不過為了確保轉運: *With this address and phone number, you can shop and ship from major Japanese e-commerce sites! However, to ensure your package is safely forwarded to you, **please complete the "identity verification process" before purchasing and shipping items from shopping websites.***
translations.*請注意這裡的大小跟重量是最終集貨後的數字。*\n\n: *Please note that the size and weight here are the final numbers after consolidation.*
translations.*這邊有發現一個隨機的網站問題， **如果在樂天網站上一直出現伺服器錯誤，可以把: *A random website issue was found here: **if a server error keeps appearing on the Rakuten site, try switching the language to Japanese** to use it normally. (Likely a multi-language error)*
translations.- **Delivery Address:** For the shipping:
- **Delivery Address:** For the shipping information, you can directly select the forwarding address you just added in Rakuten Shipping, or add a new forwarding address yourself (please be sure to enter the full forwarding address including the final number).

- **Payment Method:** I paid directly by credit card (since it's a purchase from Japan, check which banks offer discounts).
translations.- **Name engraving line 1**\n\n- **Name:
- **Name engraving line 1**

- **Name engraving line 2**

- **Name engraving line 3**

- **Name engraving line 4**
translations.- **Shape/Size**: Choose the style you w:
- **Shape/Size**: Choose the style you want (please refer to the product page images; options include wide mouth, narrow mouth, and various capacities).

- **Color**: Choose the style you want (please refer to the product page images)
translations.- Be sure to enter the forwarding wareho:
- Be sure to enter the forwarding warehouse address including the final `白石町6–1 RGXセンター XXXXXXX` English and number code, as this is your unique identification address.

- You can click "Add Now" to directly add the address to your Rakuten account.
translations.- Because I wanted engraving, it require:
- Because I wanted engraving, it required 7–10 days to produce. Additionally, I bought a magazine and had to wait for it to arrive at Rakuten forwarding.

- Looking at the shipping time alone, the forwarding center took only 1 day to receive the goods, and the entire process from packing to delivery took just 3 days, which is very fast!

- Total cost including shipping: NT $4,744. (See details in the text; shipping is more expensive due to the small purchase quantity.)
translations.- Compensation Service: Paid but Item No:
- Compensation Service: Paid but Item Not Delivered

- Compensation Service: Product Damage (Please obtain a damage report issued by the logistics company)

- Compensation Service: Paid but Item Not Delivered

- Compensation Service: Product Damage (Please obtain a damage report issued by the logistics company)

- Compensation Service: For receiving items that clearly differ from the product description or are defective

- Compensation Service: If the received branded product is a counterfeit, infringing trademark rights (covered under the Safe Shopping Guarantee for over 1,000 brands)

- Compensation amount: up to 300,000 Japanese yen

- No handling fees or annual fees
translations.- DHL Express (Super Express Air): 1–3 d:
- DHL Express (Super Express Air): 1–3 days, 9,100 yen  
  According to a friend's advice, if you use DHL, remember to [apply for tax payment before delivery](https://roo.cash/blog/dhl-introduction/#DHL_%E5%85%88%E7%A8%85%E5%BE%8C%E6%94%BE%E6%98%AF%E4%BB%80%E9%BA%BC%EF%BC%9F){:target="_blank"} to avoid extra handling fees if customs inspects and charges additional tax.

- **EMS Express Air Shipping: 3–8 days, 6,550 JPY (I chose this, actually received in 2 days, very fast)**

- ECMS Economy Air Shipping: 6–11 days, 6,280 JPY

- Sea Shipping: 20–40 days, 5,620 JPY
translations.- Exclusive oxidation coloring pattern t:
- Exclusive oxidation coloring pattern technology, offering vibrant and brilliant colors with multiple options available

- Exclusive double-layer insulation structure, keeps drinks cold without condensation and hot without burning your hands

- Exclusive special inner cup design that automatically creates long-lasting fine bubbles when drinking beer

- The cup rim is tightly sealed to prevent mouth scratches

- Pure titanium material, very lightweight, antibacterial, and odor-free
translations.- Noshi content: The type of congratulat:
- Noshi content: The type of congratulatory message, such as "御祝" (celebration), "祝壽" (birthday wishes), etc. If not needed, select "No noshi."

- Type of Noshi: Gift label style, as shown in the picture below. If not needed, select "No Noshi."

- Types of Mizuhiki (Decorative Cord) for Noshi: Styles of celebratory cord bindings, as shown below. If not needed, select "No Noshi."
translations.- Passport English name, [English addres: - Passport English name, [English address](https://www.post.gov.tw/post/internet/SearchZone/index.jsp?ID=130112){:target="_blank"}, **your phone number (replace the leading 0 with 886)**
translations.- Prepare your original ID card and mobi: - Prepare your original ID card and mobile phone, then proceed with facial recognition verification. The entire process can be completed online 24/7 through self-service.
translations.- Remove packaging boxes, shoe boxes, fl:
- Remove packaging boxes, shoe boxes, flyers, catalogs, delivery notes, etc.: to reduce weight and volume, saving shipping costs.

- Package Waterproofing Treatment

- Use reinforced boxes for international shipping: I checked this option, which means using a larger cardboard box plus cushioning paper to protect your items.
translations.- Surname (Kanji), Given Name (Kanji): E:
- Surname (Kanji), Given Name (Kanji): Enter your name in Chinese characters

- Last Name (Katakana), First Name (Katakana): Enter your name in Katakana. You can [use this website for translation](https://dokochina.com/katakana.php){:target="_blank"}, or use a nickname, for example: リー, ハリー.
translations.- You can earn Rakuten points! And use p: - You can earn Rakuten points! And use points to pay!
translations.- [Horie Titanium Cup](https://a.r10.to/:
- [Horie Titanium Cup](https://a.r10.to/hkPx9m){:target="_blank"} Kiln-made Booster / 400ml ¥19,800 JPY — NT $4,079

- Shipping cost per person: NT$665

- Customs Duty: Not charged
translations.1. First, click to change the language t:
1. First, click to change the language to Traditional Chinese for easier operation.

2. Click My Page to activate the forwarding service.

However, to ensure your package is safely forwarded to you, **please complete the "identity verification process" before purchasing and shipping items from shopping websites.***
translations.> Of course, the best deal is still to b: > Of course, the best deal is still to buy directly at Japanese department stores and get a tax refund! The estimated price is around NT$ 3,600.
translations.DHL 快遞 (超級特快空運)：1–3 天 9,100 日圓\n據朋友提供的意見:
DHL Express (Super Express Air): 1–3 days, 9,100 yen  
According to a friend's advice, if you use DHL, remember to [apply for tax payment before delivery](https://roo.cash/blog/dhl-introduction/#DHL_%E5%85%88%E7%A8%85%E5%BE%8C%E6%94%BE%E6%98%AF%E4%BB%80%E9%BA%BC%EF%BC%9F){:target="_blank"} to avoid extra handling fees if customs inspects and charges additional tax.

translations.Horie 鈦杯寄送的紙箱原封不動放在樂天轉運的紙箱中。\n\n: The Horie titanium cup's original sealed box was placed intact inside the Rakuten forwarding box.
translations.[官方售價](https://a.r10.to/hkPx9m){:target=: [Official Price](https://a.r10.to/hkPx9m){:target="_blank"} **¥19,800 yen (about NT $4,080 TWD)**, free shipping within Japan.
translations.[樂天轉運最長可以免費保管貨物 30 天](https://globalexpr: [Rakuten Global Express offers free storage for up to 30 days](https://globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/faq/detail?id=99){:target="_blank"}. Once all items have arrived and are consolidated, you can request packaging and shipment.
translations.のしの内容：賀簽類型，例如御祝、祝壽..等等，不用就選「のし不要」\n: Noshi content: The type of congratulatory message, such as "御祝" (celebration), "祝壽" (birthday wishes), etc. If not needed, select "No noshi."
translations.のしの水引きの種類：賀簽綁線樣式，如下圖，不用就選「のし不要」\n: Types of Mizuhiki (Decorative Cord) for Noshi: Styles of celebratory cord bindings, as shown below. If not needed, select "No Noshi".
translations.のしの種類：賀簽樣式，如下圖，不用就選「のし不要」\n: Type of Noshi: Gift label style, as shown in the picture below. If not needed, select "No Noshi".
translations.上方是 Amazon 買的雜誌(郵寄的紙包裝已破，不過內容物沒事)，下方才是 H: The above is the magazine bought from Amazon (the paper packaging for shipping was damaged, but the contents are fine), and below is the Horie titanium cup.
translations.上次去日本被燒到，Horie 鈦杯的主要特色：\n\n: Last time I went to Japan, I got hooked on the Horie Titanium Cup. Its main features are:
translations.下一步，補填姓名資訊。\n\n: Next, fill in your name information.
translations.下一步，輸入信用卡 or Paypal 完成付款：\n\n: Next, enter your credit card or PayPal information to complete the payment:
translations.不同寄送方式有不同限制， [務必詳閱](https://globalexpres: Different shipping methods have different restrictions. Please [read carefully](https://globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/help/country/detail?country=TW){:target="_blank"}.
translations.他也會傳訊息告知出貨時間。\n\n: He will also send a message informing the shipping time.
translations.使用國際配送專用加固箱：我有勾，實際就是再用個大紙箱+防撞紙包裝你的東西。\n: Using the reinforced box for international shipping: I checked this option, which basically means using a larger cardboard box plus cushioning paper to protect your items.
translations.先點擊語言換成繁體中文方便操作\n: First, click to change the language to Traditional Chinese for easier operation.
translations.兩個杯子＋一本雜之實際箱子並不大。\n\n: The two cups plus one magazine do not take up much space in the actual box.
translations.到此從日本樂天網站註冊、樂天轉運使用、下單購物、出貨、寄回台灣、EZWay，都完: Up to this point, registration on the Japanese Rakuten site, using Rakuten forwarding, placing orders, shipping, sending back to Taiwan, and EZWay are all completed. Now just wait for the goods to arrive!
translations.前往信箱收取驗證碼完成信箱驗證。\n\n: Go to your email inbox to retrieve the verification code and complete the email verification.
translations.去除包裝盒、鞋盒、廣告單、目錄、出貨單..等等：讓重量體積減少，省運費。\n: Remove packaging boxes, shoe boxes, flyers, catalogs, delivery notes, etc.: to reduce weight and volume, saving shipping costs.
translations.可以使用 [官方工具](https://globalexpress.rakute: You can use the [official tool](https://globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/estimate/?l-id=top_estimate){:target="_blank"} to estimate the shipping cost.
translations.可以累積樂天點數！及使用點數抵付！\n: You can earn Rakuten points! And use points to pay!
translations.可以選擇包裝服務：(可點 i 有圖文說明)\n\n: You can choose the packaging service: (Click the "i" for illustrated instructions)
translations.可點擊「立即新增」直接把地址新增到樂天帳戶\n: You can click "Add Now" to directly add the address to your Rakuten account.
translations.單純看轉運時間，轉運站收到貨只花 1 天、轉運從打包出貨到收到只花 3 天，可以: Looking at the shipping time alone, the forwarding center took only 1 day to receive the goods, and the entire process from packing to delivery took just 3 days, which is very fast!
translations.因為我要刻字，所以需要 7–10 天製作，另外又買了雜誌多等了雜誌到樂天轉運的時: Because I wanted engraving, it required 7–10 days to produce. Additionally, I bought a magazine and had to wait for it to arrive at Rakuten forwarding.
translations.國際配送專用加固箱就是多這個紙箱＋周圍跟底部防撞紙包裝。\n\n: The reinforced box for international shipping includes this extra cardboard box plus shockproof paper packaging around and at the bottom.
translations.在購物網站上同樣的操作只要記得照樂天轉運的你的收件資訊填寫寄送地址、聯絡電話(填: On the shopping website, just remember to fill in the shipping address and contact phone number with your Rakuten forwarding information.
translations.大約隔天早上就收到包裝完成通知了。\n\n: I received the packaging completion notification the next morning.
translations.如果你沒有從海外買東西回來的經驗， [務必要完成 EZWay 實名驗證，下載 E: If you have no experience buying items from overseas, [be sure to complete EZWay real-name verification by downloading the EZWay app, registering, and completing the verification](https://www.rakuten.com.tw/magazine/life/2022/012802/#D){:target="_blank"}.
translations.如果有選擇要刻字，HORIE 會再收到訂單後傳送確認結果給你，沒問題可以回覆「ご: If you choose to add engraving, HORIE will send you a confirmation after receiving the order. If everything is correct, you can reply with "ご送付いただいたレイアウトを確認しました。問題ございませんので製作を進めてください。" to let them start production.
translations.如果認證手續未完成會有以下警告提示：\n\n: If the verification process is not completed, the following warning will appear:
translations.如購買的商品非樂天市場，提供基礎的轉運寄送保障：\n\n: If the purchased item is not from Rakuten Ichiba, basic forwarding shipping protection is provided:
translations.姓(漢字)、名(漢字)：填寫中文姓名\n: Surname (Kanji), Given Name (Kanji): Enter your name in Chinese characters
translations.姓(片假名)、名(片假名)：填寫姓名片假名，可以 [用這網站翻譯](https:: Last Name (Katakana), First Name (Katakana): Enter your name in Katakana. You can [use this website for translation](https://dokochina.com/katakana.php){:target="_blank"}, or use a nickname, for example: リー, ハリー.
translations.已送達商品：總共三樣。\n\n: Delivered items: A total of three.
translations.想要的東西自己買，用樂天轉運購買日本商品寄回台灣的紀錄與教學，以購買 Horie: Buying what you want yourself: A record and guide for using Rakuten forwarding to purchase Japanese products and ship them back to Taiwan, using the Horie titanium cup as an example.
translations.想說既然都要買日本樂天市場的東西，就直接試用樂天的轉運/集運服務；當然樂天轉運也: Since I was going to buy items from Japan's Rakuten Market anyway, I decided to try Rakuten's forwarding/ consolidation service; of course, Rakuten forwarding is not limited to Rakuten purchases—it also supports other e-commerce platforms like Amazon Japan (Amazon JP), Yahoo Shopping / Yahoo Auctions Japan, Mercari, Biccamera, and more.
translations.我的頁面右下方會顯示專屬您資訊。\n\n: Your personalized information will be displayed at the bottom right of the page.
translations.拉到最下方商品規格選擇 (商品詳細を選択)。\n\n: Scroll to the bottom to select product specifications (商品詳細を選択).
translations.收到 HORIE 出貨通知後約 1–3 天就送達樂天轉運倉庫了。\n\n: After receiving the HORIE shipping notification, the package arrives at the Rakuten forwarding warehouse in about 1–3 days.
translations.整體色彩跟紋路及漸層非常鮮艷魔幻，美的很不真實。\n\n: The overall colors, patterns, and gradients are very vivid and magical, creating an unreal beauty.
translations.最吸引我的是前三項獨家技術 **＋它是保溫杯** ，況且我目前沒有任何鈦杯，對保: What attracted me the most were the first three exclusive technologies **＋ it is a thermos cup**. Besides, I don't have any titanium cups yet, and I am troubled by the issue of lingering odors in thermos cups, so I really want to buy one to try.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.杯口收密，不刮嘴\n: The cup rim is tightly sealed to prevent mouth scratches.
translations.查了一下在台灣買，不管是電商平台或是個人賣家價格都在 NT $5,500 台幣上: I checked the prices in Taiwan; whether on e-commerce platforms or from individual sellers, they are around NT$5,500. Occasionally, group buys or exhibition events offer prices around NT$4,200, which is a good deal to consider.
translations.樂天完成出貨後也會收到通知，有追蹤碼可以確認貨物狀態。\n\n: Rakuten will also send a notification after shipping is completed, including a tracking number to check the shipment status.
translations.準備好身分證正本跟手機後，點透過臉部臉部認證進行認證，直接線上 24 小時自助完: Prepare your original ID card and mobile phone, then proceed with facial recognition verification. The entire process can be completed online 24/7 through self-service.
translations.無需手續費、年費\n: No handling fees or annual fees
translations.狀態會到：出貨作業中。\n\n: Status will change to: Shipping in progress.
translations.獨家特殊內杯面設計，喝啤酒時可以自動產生持久的綿密泡泡\n: Exclusive special inner cup design that automatically creates long-lasting fine bubbles when drinking beer
translations.獨家的氧化上色花紋技術，色彩斑斕璀璨、顏色多元可選\n: Exclusive oxidation coloring pattern technology, vibrant and brilliant colors with multiple options available
translations.獨家的雙隔層保溫結構，保冷不流汗、保溫不燙手\n: Exclusive double-layer insulation structure, keeps cold without condensation and hot without burning your hands
translations.當然最划算還是親自去日本百貨公司買＋退稅！價格猜測在 NT$ 3,600 左右。: Of course, the best deal is still to buy directly at Japanese department stores and get a tax refund! The estimated price is around NT$ 3,600.
translations.確認合併包裝(寄送)的貨品內容，無誤後點「確認發貨之包裹」。\n\n: Confirm the contents of the consolidated package for shipment, and if correct, click "Confirm Shipment Package."
translations.確認商品規格無誤之後，點右方「購入手続き」\n\n: After confirming the product specifications are correct, click the "Proceed to Purchase" button on the right.
translations.確認貨物內容跟收件人資訊，無誤後點「選擇運送方法」。\n\n: Confirm the package contents and recipient information. If correct, click "Select Shipping Method."
translations.第一步同意使用者條款， **部分商品如易燃物、噴霧、生鮮食品禁止寄送** 。\n: Step one is to agree to the user terms. **Some items, such as flammable goods, sprays, and fresh foods, are prohibited from shipping**.
translations.第二步輸入本人資訊，務必輸入真實護照英文姓名、與生日。\n\n: Step 2: Enter your personal information. Be sure to input your real passport name in English and your date of birth.
translations.純鈦材質，非常輕、抗菌、不殘留味道\n: Pure titanium material, very lightweight, antibacterial, and odor-free
translations.細節請 [參考官方說明](https://event.rakuten.co.jp: For details, please [refer to the official instructions](https://event.rakuten.co.jp/anshin/anshinshopping/zh-tw/top/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.細節請 [參考官方說明](https://globalexpress.rakut: For details, please refer to the [official explanation](https://globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/help/insurance?l-id=help_tw_insurance){:target="_blank"}.
translations.花費總計含運費：NT $4,744 入手。(細節請看內文，因為買的少所以運費較貴: Total cost including shipping: NT $4,744. (See details in the text; shipping is more expensive due to the small purchase quantity.)
translations.註冊完樂天到 [樂天轉運](https://secure.globalexpre: After registering on Rakuten, you will be automatically logged in to [Rakuten Global Express](https://secure.globalexpress.rakuten.co.jp/mypage/register/invite?key=aanar03e62e0ckog4nWPIFcV7FTuy6JGEeCL1HwxrPgcSjKRlGHs1GY6PkH0%3D){:target="_blank"}.
translations.護照英文姓名、 [英文地址](https://www.post.gov.tw/p: Passport English name, [English address](https://www.post.gov.tw/post/internet/SearchZone/index.jsp?ID=130112){:target="_blank"}, **your phone number (replace the leading 0 with 886)**
translations.賠償服務：商品損壞 (請取得物流公司開立之損壞報告)\n: Compensation Service: Product Damage (Please obtain a damage report issued by the logistics company)
translations.賠償服務：已付款但商品未送達\n: Compensation Service: Paid but Item Not Delivered
translations.賠償服務：收到的品牌商品是仿冒品，即侵害商標權之物品（在安心購物保障範圍内的 1: Compensation Service: If the received branded product is a counterfeit, infringing trademark rights (covered under the Safe Shopping Guarantee for over 1,000 brands)
translations.賠償服務：收到與商品頁商品說明明顯相異的商品或瑕疵品\n: Compensation Service: For receiving items that clearly differ from the product description or are defective
translations.賠償金額：上限為 30 萬日圓\n: Compensation amount: up to 300,000 Japanese yen
translations.購買任何物品想寄回台灣時請確認是否為禁止商品。\n\n: Please check whether the item is prohibited before purchasing and shipping it back to Taiwan.
translations.輸入其他平台購買的店家、商品資訊跟金額。\n\n: Enter store, product information, and amount purchased from other platforms.
translations.輸入電子郵件信箱、密碼、英文姓名，送出後即可完成註冊。\n\n: Enter your email address, password, and English name. Submit to complete the registration.
translations.轉運倉地址務必要輸入到最後的 `白石町6–1 RGXセンター XXXXXXX`: Be sure to enter the forwarding warehouse address all the way to the final `白石町6–1 RGXセンター XXXXXXX` English and number code, as that is your unique identification address.
translations.送出後狀態會變成：包裝作業中，等作業完成再付款跟出貨。\n\n: After submission, the status will change to: Packaging in progress. Please wait for the process to complete before making payment and shipping.
translations.這是窯創系列的商品頁，要選擇其他系列 [可以點 HORIE 商城首頁](http: This is the product page for the Kiln Creation series. To choose other series, [you can click HORIE store homepage](https://a.r10.to/hkG3CK){:target="_blank"} to view.
translations.這次除了買 HORIE 鈦杯之外，還從 日本亞馬遜 Amazon JP 買了一個: This time, besides buying the HORIE titanium cup, I also purchased a magazine from Amazon Japan (Amazon JP) and plan to ship them together back to Taiwan.
translations.運費也能獲得樂天積分(1%)！\n\n: Shipping fees also earn Rakuten points (1%)!
translations.都填好規格內容後點「かごに追加」加入購物車，お届け先 收件人資訊選我們樂天轉運的: After filling in all the specifications, click "かごに追加" to add the item to your cart. For the delivery address (お届け先), select our Rakuten forwarding service in "Kanagawa Prefecture." Below, it will show the estimated delivery time to Rakuten forwarding and free shipping. Once everything is added, click the cart icon above to proceed to checkout:
translations.都完成後等商家出貨，寄送到達樂天轉運也會收到通知。\n\n: After completing the order, wait for the seller to ship. You will also receive a notification when the package arrives at the Rakuten forwarding center.
translations.都沒問題後點「注文を確定する」完成下單。\n\n: After confirming everything is correct, click "注文を確定する" to complete the order.
translations.除了提供轉運/集運服務之外， **使用樂天** 轉 **運購買樂天市場的商品**: In addition to providing forwarding/consolidation services, **using Rakuten** forwarding to **purchase items from Rakuten Ichiba** also offers the following guarantees:
translations.非樂天本家買的商品寄送到轉運建議在下單後登記一下。\n\n: For items not purchased directly from Rakuten, it is recommended to register the shipment with the forwarding service after placing the order.
translations.馬上開一瓶生啤酒加冰塊測試，保冰效果確實好、啤酒也有綿密的氣泡，很好喝、 **而: Open a bottle of draft beer with ice cubes for testing. The ice retention is indeed good, the beer has a smooth foam, tastes great, **and it really doesn’t sweat**.
translations.點「貨物一覽」 → 「待付款」 貨物 → 「前往付款」。\n\n: Click "Cargo List" → "Pending Payment" cargo → "Proceed to Payment".
translations.點擊上方「我的頁面」或「我的頁面頂端」前往我的頁面主頁：\n\n: Click on "My Page" or the top of "My Page" above to go to the My Page homepage:
translations.點擊我的頁面開通轉運\n: Click My Page to Activate Forwarding Service
